title: Implementer Result
description: Result schema for the implementer role. The implementer makes code changes within allowed_paths and reports what changed.

status.description: Whether the implementation finished or is blocked on a dependency.

summary.description: One paragraph summary of what changed and why.

changed_paths.description: Relative paths to files created or modified.

artifacts.description: Brief evidence items describing what was produced.

tests_run.description: Test commands executed and their outcomes. Empty array if no tests were run.

examples.summary: Refactored auth module to use JWT tokens with RS256 signing. Added token refresh endpoint and updated middleware.
